creator: samir@noir.im
text:
Created attachment 236339
git diff

Hi,

This patch update sysutils/chezmoi to 2.22.0

poudriere testport and portlint are both OK.

For the record, modules2tuple generate the following error:

  #       error getting refs for aws/aws-sdk-go-v2: apis.get https://api.github.com/repos/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2/git/refs/tags: 502, body: {
  "message": "Server Error"

This is explained in bug #265708, due to too much tags on the Github repository.
GH_TUPLE is still well generated by modules2tuple, aws-sdk-go-v2 is updated correctly so this is ok.

Thanks !
